site.title: Osteoperionews

site.author: Dr. Ernesto Bruschi
site.description: Weekly curated summaries of open access articles in periodontology and dental implantology

home.heading: Periodontology & Dental Implant Research
home.intro: A weekly digest of peer-reviewed, open-access research in periodontology, dental implantology, and peri-implant medicine. Articles are selected and summarized by Dr. Ernesto Bruschi — periodontist, implantologist, and oral surgeon.
home.noArticles: No articles yet. The first update will arrive next Monday.

archive.title: All articles
archive.description: Complete archive of every weekly open-access periodontology and dental-implant research summary curated by Dr. Ernesto Bruschi.
archive.intro: Every weekly summary published on Osteoperionews, newest first.

article.aiDisclaimer: This summary is automatically generated from the original abstract and curated by Dr. Ernesto Bruschi. Always refer to the original publication for clinical decisions.

about.title: About
about.text: Osteoperionews is a curated feed of the latest open access research in periodontology and dental implantology. Every week, new articles from leading journals are selected and summarized in English and Italian.
about.disclaimer: Osteoperionews content is provided for informational and educational purposes for dental professionals only and does not constitute medical advice, nor does it replace the clinical judgement, diagnosis, or treatment of a qualified professional. Summaries are automatically generated from the original abstracts and curated by Dr. Ernesto Bruschi: always refer to the full publication for any clinical decision.

footer.disclaimer: Summaries of recent literature for educational and informational purposes.
footer.newsletterDesc: New articles in your inbox every Monday.
footer.newsletterSuccess: Subscribed! You'll receive the digest every Monday.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Osteoperionews privacy policy: what data we collect (only your newsletter email address), how we process it, and your rights under the GDPR.
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how Osteoperionews (osteoperionews.bonebenders.com), operated by Dr. Ernesto Bruschi, collects, uses, and protects your personal data in compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, Regulation 2016/679).
privacy.controllerText: The data controller is Dr. Ernesto Bruschi, a natural person, registered with the Frosinone Register of Dentists (Albo Odontoiatri) no. 594, VAT 02316180609 — dott.bruschi@gmail.com
privacy.dataCollectedText: This site collects personal data only when you voluntarily subscribe to the newsletter. The only data collected is your email address. No profiling, tracking, or analytics cookies are used.
privacy.purposeText: Your email address is used exclusively to send you a weekly newsletter containing summaries of recently published open access articles in periodontology and dental implantology. The legal basis for processing is your explicit consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
privacy.thirdPartyText: The newsletter is managed through Brevo (Sendinblue SAS, 106 boulevard Haussmann, 75008 Paris, France), which acts as data processor. Brevo processes your email address solely for newsletter delivery. Brevo's privacy policy is available at https://www.brevo.com/legal/privacypolicy/. This site is hosted on GitHub Pages (GitHub Inc., San Francisco, CA, USA). GitHub may collect technical access logs (IP address, browser type). GitHub's privacy policy is available at https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement. The site is delivered through Cloudflare's CDN (Cloudflare, Inc., San Francisco, CA, USA), which acts as an infrastructure provider and may process technical connection data (including IP address) for security and content-delivery purposes; newsletter sign-ups are forwarded to Brevo via a Cloudflare Worker. Cloudflare's privacy policy is available at https://www.cloudflare.com/privacypolicy/.
privacy.retentionText: Your email address is retained until you unsubscribe from the newsletter. You can unsubscribe at any time via the link at the bottom of each email.
privacy.rightsText: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, port, and object to the processing of your personal data. You also have the right to withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact: dott.bruschi@gmail.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante per la Protezione dei Dati Personali — www.garanteprivacy.it).
privacy.cookiesText: This site uses only essential technical cookies required for basic functionality (e.g., cookie consent preference). No profiling, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.changesText: This policy may be updated. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated revision date.
